message:
feat(conformance): Implement I/O Test Suite (IO-001 through IO-007) [asupersync-v4cw]

Add conformance test infrastructure for async runtime validation:
- RuntimeInterface trait with associated types for channels, files, sockets
- AsyncFile, TcpListener, TcpStream, UdpSocket traits
- Test framework with TestResult, TestMeta, ConformanceTest types
- conformance_test! macro for defining tests

I/O tests implemented:
- IO-001: File write and read roundtrip
- IO-002: File seek operations
- IO-003: TCP echo server
- IO-004: TCP concurrent connections
- IO-005: UDP send and receive
- IO-006: Buffered I/O (multiple small writes/reads)
- IO-007: Socket read timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
